message:
fix: pin overrides survive SSE renders for 8 seconds

The optimistic pin/unpin update was being immediately overwritten
by the next SSE push (every ~2s) which still had stale server
cache. Now pin toggles are stored as time-limited overrides that
are re-applied on every SSE render until the server catches up.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
